Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 4 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Post Comment
30 to 100k???
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2004 at 6:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800301352
14 posts
Any info on why this piece of garbage is worth so much? Oviously a quest item (better be) buuut what quest?
▲ Page top
RE: 30 to 100k???
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2004 at 10:42 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Its not worth that much. Some person with "issues" probably posted a ridiculous price, in an attempt to be funny. It would appear that Allakhazam has removed thoat price since your post, as the pricing data i saw was 10 to 100pp.

There is a link for bad prices on every item page. When you run across the work of those people with "issues" click that link and report the price. Remember all price data is member reported, not Allakhazam generated.
▲ Page top
RE: 30 to 100k???
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2007 at 7:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591930788915
16 posts
3 and 1/2 years later and it still says 100k LOL.... this is one of my favorite items I carry it all the time for fun little links :))

# Apr 01 2004 at 6:24 PM Rating: Default

Idiots :p
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2002 at 6:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778684275
3 posts
Vah shir kerrans and the kittys in stoneburmt have 3 diffrent factions, the kitties in stoneburnt are peacekeepers or something like that. and the kerrans on isle have there own faction vah shir have the var shal faction :p hope that helps
▲ Page top
faction
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 3:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758444600
View User Forum
159 posts
The faction he's probably refering to is with the Vah Shir on Luclin, in the new expansion Shadows of Luclin. i'd hunt there too, however i as well do not wish to be KoS to the Cat people.
Even if the faction turns out to be unrelated, the way i see it is why take the chance?

Nuddo Fastlewter
35 druid
Immortalis
E'ci
▲ Page top
RE: faction
QuoteReply
# May 03 2002 at 5:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362100002
11 posts
Actual the faction hit is to the kitties called Kerrans( like the ones on Kerran Isle, duh) and not to Vah Shir, so kill with pleasure!
▲ Page top
RE: faction
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2003 at 8:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
Yeah, I'm ally to the Vah Shir and KOS to the Kerrans; odd thing is, as a Dark Elf Necro I started out KOS to the Kerrans but indifferent to the Vah Shir.
▲ Page top
RE: faction
QuoteReply
# May 14 2003 at 2:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758796491
90 posts
I don't think anyone is KoS by the Vah Shir : I have a friend who brought his necro Iksar follower of Cazic-Thule (which means he probably is one of the most hated person in the EQ world :) and the guards and citizens of Shar Vahl never attacked him (I think they coned indif).
I've also seen ogres and trolls in Shar Vahl, but I'm not sure if they improved their faction to get there.
But hey, as Dark Elf and Iksar necros are welcomed in our town, I think it's the same for everybody...

And cat people are indif to me, except a few prisonners in the warrens who are raedy to attack.

Edited, Thu May 22 10:35:42 2003
▲ Page top
RE: faction
QuoteReply
# Dec 02 2003 at 8:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760803480
View User Forum
277 posts
The vah shir have little experience with these races and theos (gods) thus neither care for or against them

QuoteReply

1 post
Can someone please tell me how to get Jo Jo to spawn? iwas on kerra for like 2 days and never even saw him once. thanks

QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 2:22 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
dude said he didnt want his faction to be murderd so he left, i just want to know whos faction whent to dubious?
▲ Page top
My experience
QuoteReply
# May 06 2001 at 2:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754013878
5 posts
Really easy to get stuff from this island as long as you aren't threatingly.. just pull to zone where are only two healers who use light healing (33 HP heal).. after two spawns of the tiger PH JoJo spawned, dropped the claws. After that kill I was dubious and didn't want to completely murder my faction on Luclin so I left =/
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 06 2001 at 3:09 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey dumbass, the faction on Kerra isnt going to effect faction on Luclin UNTIL AFTER the portals to Luclin open (game release). Then the faction will coincide with eachother. Read the FAQ on www.everquest.com and under SoL page.
Good Claws, but LVL is way off
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2001 at 4:12 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Hi,

I went to Kerra Island as a 15 Ranger to kill Jo Jo, but he conned RED to me. Becareful as there are two cat shamans next to him that constantly heal him if you do damage to the tiger.

Archoon Sagittarius, XEV
▲ Page top
fast
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2001 at 7:36 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
it may not have damage but its fast and good for duel wielding with a weapon with more damage
▲ Page top
nifty
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2000 at 3:40 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
nice, the poor-mans thulians. only 1 less dmg and 1/3 the price. the only problem with that is next to no one goes into kerra isle (i dont see why, theres almost no faction tied to the place other then the kitties themselves).
also, im pretty sure these are primary hand only (making the "wolverine" look that much harder to attain) which leaves the all/all claws from Velious and the crappy claws from Kunark as the only off-hand claws. grr.
▲ Page top
RE: nifty
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2001 at 9:14 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591752270484
7 posts
I got a sarnak etchatka(think i spelled thst wrong), and thullian claws.It took me 2 days of whealing and dealing, and around 500pp, but if you have the $, its not that hard to get 2 claws.
Theese claws are not half bad, they're good and fast, but they don't hit that hard.
